definitions: A system of integrated software applications that manages business processes, often in real-time and mediated by software and technology.
The process of managing and integrating the essential parts of a business.
A business management software, usually a suite of integrated applications, that an organization can use to collect, store, manage, and interpret data from many business activities.
examples: Many companies implement Enterprise Resource Planning to streamline operations.
The new Enterprise Resource Planning system improved efficiency.
Understanding Enterprise Resource Planning is crucial for modern business.
